suppress.notes: DOMPurify 3.3.2 inside swagger-ui (transitive via springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui 3.0.3, latest stable as of 2026-04-28). The CVEs require ADD_TAGS-as-function plus FORBID_TAGS, which Swagger UI's default config does not exercise. No upstream fix yet; suppression remains until springdoc bumps DOMPurify. Reviewed 2026-04-28 as part of DORA Article 9 ICT risk management cycle.
